formulas.formula: Gross profit = Revenue - Cost of revenue
Total operating expenses = Research and development + Sales, general and administrative
formulas.operation: Research and development + Sales, general and administrative

formulas.formula: Operating income = Gross profit - Total operating expenses
Total other income, net = Interest income - Interest expense + Other income, net
formulas.operation: Interest income - Interest expense + Other income, net

formulas.formula: Income before income tax = Operating income + Total other income, net
formulas.operation: Operating income + Total other income, net

formulas.formula: Net income = Income before income tax - Income tax expense
formulas.operation: Income before income tax - Income tax expense

formulas.formula: Diluted weighted average shares = Basic weighted average shares + Dilutive impact of outstanding equity awards
components: Dilutive impact of outstanding equity awards
formulas.operation: Basic weighted average shares + Dilutive impact of outstanding equity awards

formulas.formula: Total current assets = Cash and cash equivalents + Marketable securities + Accounts receivable, net + Inventories + Prepaid expenses and other current assets
components: Prepaid expenses and other current assets
formulas.operation: Cash and cash equivalents + Marketable securities + Accounts receivable, net + Inventories + Prepaid expenses and other current assets

formulas.formula: Total assets = Total current assets + Property and equipment, net + Operating lease assets + Goodwill + Intangible assets, net + Deferred income tax assets + Other assets
formulas.operation: Total current assets + Property and equipment, net + Operating lease assets + Goodwill + Intangible assets, net + Deferred income tax assets + Other assets

formulas.formula: Total current liabilities = Accounts payable + Accrued and other current liabilities + Short-term debt
formulas.operation: Accounts payable + Accrued and other current liabilities + Short-term debt

formulas.formula: Total liabilities = Total current liabilities + Long-term debt + Long-term operating lease liabilities + Other long-term liabilities
formulas.operation: Total current liabilities + Long-term debt + Long-term operating lease liabilities + Other long-term liabilities

formulas.formula: Total shareholders equity = Preferred stock + Common stock + Additional paid-in capital + Accumulated other comprehensive income + Retained earnings
formulas.operation: Preferred stock + Common stock + Additional paid-in capital + Accumulated other comprehensive income + Retained earnings

formulas.formula: Total liabilities and shareholders equity = Total liabilities + Commitments and contingencies + Total shareholders equity

formulas.formula: Net cash provided by operating activities = Net income + Stock-based compensation expense + Depreciation and amortization + Deferred income taxes - Gains on non-marketable equity securities and publicly-held equity securities, net - Other - Accounts receivable - Inventories - Prepaid expenses and other assets + Accounts payable + Accrued and other current liabilities + Other long-term liabilities
components: Gains on non-marketable equity securities and publicly-held equity securities, net
Net cash provided by operating activities
formulas.operation: Net income + Stock-based compensation expense + Depreciation and amortization + Deferred income taxes - Gains on non-marketable equity securities and publicly-held equity securities, net - Other - Accounts receivable - Inventories - Prepaid expenses and other assets + Accounts payable + Accrued and other current liabilities + Other long-term liabilities
formulas.result_label: Net cash provided by operating activities

formulas.formula: Net cash used in investing activities = Proceeds from maturities of marketable securities + Proceeds from sales of marketable securities + Proceeds from sales of non-marketable equity securities - Purchases of marketable securities - Purchases related to property and equipment and intangible assets - Purchases of non-marketable equity securities - Acquisitions, net of cash acquired
components: Proceeds from maturities of marketable securities
Proceeds from sales of marketable securities
Proceeds from sales of non-marketable equity securities
Purchases related to property and equipment and intangible assets
Net cash used in investing activities
formulas.operation: Proceeds from maturities of marketable securities + Proceeds from sales of marketable securities + Proceeds from sales of non-marketable equity securities - Purchases of marketable securities - Purchases related to property and equipment and intangible assets - Purchases of non-marketable equity securities - Acquisitions, net of cash acquired
formulas.result_label: Net cash used in investing activities

formulas.formula: Net cash used in financing activities = Proceeds related to employee stock plans - Payments related to repurchases of common stock - Payments related to employee stock plan taxes - Dividends paid - Principal payments on property and equipment and intangible assets - Repayment of debt
components: Proceeds related to employee stock plans
Payments related to repurchases of common stock
Payments related to employee stock plan taxes
Principal payments on property and equipment and intangible assets
Net cash used in financing activities
formulas.operation: Proceeds related to employee stock plans - Payments related to repurchases of common stock - Payments related to employee stock plan taxes - Dividends paid - Principal payments on property and equipment and intangible assets - Repayment of debt
formulas.result_label: Net cash used in financing activities

formulas.formula: Change in cash and cash equivalents = Net cash provided by operating activities + Net cash used in investing activities + Net cash used in financing activities
components: Net cash provided by operating activities
Net cash used in investing activities
Net cash used in financing activities
Change in cash and cash equivalents
formulas.operation: Net cash provided by operating activities + Net cash used in investing activities + Net cash used in financing activities
formulas.result_label: Change in cash and cash equivalents

xbrl_not_on_statement.classification: Non-cash investing activity - property equipment and intangible assets acquired but not paid, disclosed in balance sheet components note
Supplemental cash flow information for leases - operating cash flow used for operating leases, disclosed in leases note
Non-cash operating activity - operating lease assets obtained in exchange for lease obligations, disclosed in leases note

cross_statement_checks.check: Net income - Income Statement vs Cash Flow Statement
Net income - Income Statement vs Cash Flow Statement (prior year nine months)
Cash and cash equivalents at end of period - Balance Sheet vs Cash Flow (Oct 26 2025)
Cash and cash equivalents beginning of period - Balance Sheet Jan 26 2025 vs Cash Flow beginning of period
Total shareholders equity - Balance Sheet (Oct 26 2025) vs Statement of Shareholders Equity ending balance
Total assets equals Total liabilities and shareholders equity (Oct 26 2025)
Total assets equals Total liabilities and shareholders equity (Jan 26 2025)
Long-term operating lease liabilities - Balance Sheet vs Leases note
Retained earnings ending balance Oct 26 2025 - Balance Sheet vs Shareholders Equity Statement
Additional paid-in capital Oct 26 2025 - Balance Sheet vs Shareholders Equity Statement

segment_data.dimension: Segment Reconciliation - Operating Income to Income Before Tax (Q3 FY2026)

formula_checks.formula: Gross profit = Revenue - Cost of revenue
Total operating expenses = Research and development + Sales, general and administrative
Operating income = Gross profit - Total operating expenses
Total other income, net = Interest income - Interest expense + Other income, net
Income before income tax = Operating income + Total other income, net
Net income = Income before income tax - Income tax expense
Diluted weighted average shares = Basic weighted average shares + Dilutive impact of outstanding equity awards

2025-07-28_2025-10-26.computation: 24327 + Dilutive impact of outstanding equity awards

2024-07-29_2024-10-27.computation: 24533 + Dilutive impact of outstanding equity awards

2025-01-27_2025-10-26.computation: 24378 + Dilutive impact of outstanding equity awards

2024-01-29_2024-10-27.computation: 24577 + Dilutive impact of outstanding equity awards

formula_checks.formula: Total current assets = Cash and cash equivalents + Marketable securities + Accounts receivable, net + Inventories + Prepaid expenses and other current assets
Total assets = Total current assets + Property and equipment, net + Operating lease assets + Goodwill + Intangible assets, net + Deferred income tax assets + Other assets
Total current liabilities = Accounts payable + Accrued and other current liabilities + Short-term debt
Total liabilities = Total current liabilities + Long-term debt + Long-term operating lease liabilities + Other long-term liabilities
Total shareholders equity = Preferred stock + Common stock + Additional paid-in capital + Accumulated other comprehensive income + Retained earnings
Total liabilities and shareholders equity = Total liabilities + Commitments and contingencies + Total shareholders equity

Net cash provided by operating activities = Net income + Stock-based compensation expense + Depreciation and amortization + Deferred income taxes - Gains on non-marketable equity securities and publicly-held equity securities, net - Other - Accounts receivable - Inventories - Prepaid expenses and other assets + Accounts payable + Accrued and other current liabilities + Other long-term liabilities

Net cash used in investing activities = Proceeds from maturities of marketable securities + Proceeds from sales of marketable securities + Proceeds from sales of non-marketable equity securities - Purchases of marketable securities - Purchases related to property and equipment and intangible assets - Purchases of non-marketable equity securities - Acquisitions, net of cash acquired

Net cash used in financing activities = Proceeds related to employee stock plans - Payments related to repurchases of common stock - Payments related to employee stock plan taxes - Dividends paid - Principal payments on property and equipment and intangible assets - Repayment of debt
Change in cash and cash equivalents = Net cash provided by operating activities + Net cash used in investing activities + Net cash used in financing activities
